text: Record the OpenAI Build Week jury outcome and close the recursive experiment
description: After judging concludes, record the official result as external evidence. Success condition: a jury win/recognition validates the strong claim that Aimparency coordinated human intent and AI action toward the stated real-world aim. If not selected, preserve the result honestly, analyze which part of the chain underperformed (idea, implementation, design, impact, or communication), update the belief about Aimparency's effectiveness, and create the next improvement aim. Do not mark the parent done merely because the entry was submitted.

status.comment: Waiting on the official OpenAI Build Week jury result, expected around 12 August 2026.
